mate.author: Gabor Maté
mate.text: When we have been prevented from learning how to say no, our bodies may end up saying it for us.

mate.author: Gabor Maté
mate.text: The attempt to escape from pain creates more pain.

mate.author: Gabor Maté
mate.text: It is impossible to understand addiction without asking what relief the addict finds, or hopes to find, in the drug or the addictive behaviour.
mate.src_label: In the Realm of Hungry Ghosts

mate.author: Gabor Maté
mate.text: Trauma is not what happens to you, but what happens inside you as a result of what happens to you.

watts.author: Alan Watts
watts.text: We do not come into this world; we come out of it, as leaves from a tree.

watts.author: Alan Watts
watts.text: When you try to stay on the surface of the water, you sink; but when you try to sink, you float.

watts.author: Alan Watts
watts.text: Tomorrow and plans for tomorrow can have no significance at all unless you are in full contact with the reality of the present.

watts.author: Alan Watts
watts.text: The only way to make sense out of change is to plunge into it, move with it, and join the dance.

watts.author: Alan Watts
watts.text: Muddy water is best cleared by leaving it alone.

perel.author: Esther Perel
perel.text: Love rests on two pillars: surrender and autonomy. Our need for togetherness exists alongside our need for separateness.

perel.author: Esther Perel
perel.text: Love is about having; desire is about wanting.

perel.author: Esther Perel
perel.text: The quality of your relationships determines the quality of your life.

perel.author: Esther Perel
perel.text: Desire is like fire, it needs air.

tip.author: ollo
tip.text: Tell the assistant the outcome you want, not the step-by-step. It fills the gaps better than a rigid recipe.

tip.author: ollo
tip.text: Paste the raw material and ask for the shape. Editing beats drafting from a blank page.

tip.author: ollo
tip.text: Give an example of what good looks like. One sample of the format you want beats three paragraphs of instructions.

tip.author: ollo
tip.text: Ask for a rough draft first, then tell it what to change. Two quick passes beat hunting for one perfect prompt.

word.text: Calmness and composure, especially in a difficult situation.
Finnish: extraordinary determination and courage in the face of adversity.
The realisation that each random passerby is living a life as vivid and complex as your own.
The distinctive, earthy, usually pleasant smell of rain falling on dry ground after a warm, dry spell.
Too great or extreme to be expressed or described in words; indescribable.
